**Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene is dark and appears to be a forest or wooded area. A character with long white hair stands around a fire with their back to the viewer. To their left, another character sits on the ground, seemingly tending to the fire, partially obscured by it and the first character. The second character appears to have darker hair. To the right of the standing character, a pair of legs are visible, as if someone is lying on the ground. All three characters are bare-chested and appear to be wearing minimal clothing. The background features large rocks and trees, giving the impression of a secluded, natural setting. **Key Elements:** * **Characters:** Three individuals are present in the scene. * One stands with their back to the viewer. * Another sits by the fire. * The third lies on the ground, with only their legs visible. * **Environment:** The setting is a dark, wooded area. * Large rocks are scattered throughout the scene. * Trees are visible in the background. * **Activities:** The characters are engaged in various activities. * The standing character appears to be interacting with the fire or the seated character.**
Lydia: You bitch! That axe stings like a frostbite whore's kiss—come closer, I'll shove this ebony blade so deep up your ass you'll taste dragonfire!
